focus: traceability - Target 2 test suite gap analysis

findingDetails.title: No orchestrator-level regression test covers the explicit status-completion enforcement flag
findingDetails.claim: The existing Target 2 tests do not exercise the MCP validation orchestrator path that iteration 7 found missing statusCompletionConsistencyEnforced, so the real P1 end-to-end flag-wiring defect can remain green while resolver-level tests pass.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Looked for direct test evidence in the two scoped test files that a folder-level MCP validation call passes SPECKIT_STATUS_COMPLETION_CONSISTENCY_GATE=true through validateFolder/orchestrator and fails on STATUS_COMPLETE_EVIDENCE_MISMATCH; none is present in the imports or test cases in the scoped files.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: If the MCP validation orchestrator is deprecated or intentionally outside the supported validation surface, this becomes a P2 parity-test gap rather than a required release-fix test gap.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if maintainers confirm the orchestrator path is unreachable for supported MCP validation, or if another test file outside the two scoped files already exercises the orchestrator enforced-mode path.

findingDetails.title: Edge-case completion-evidence behavior lacks direct parser regression tests
findingDetails.claim: Iteration 6's malformed pct, quoted pct, comments-only tasks, whitespace-only implementation summary, and derive-only concurrency cases remain covered only indirectly or by code reading, not by direct parser tests in the scoped suite.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Close if direct tests are added for the five edge cases, or if maintainers document the current branch-level tests as intentionally sufficient.

traceabilityChecks.spec_code: CONDITIONAL: REQ-005 has direct tests for the main deriveStatus and validator branches, but the active orchestrator enforced-mode defect from iteration 7 is not pinned by an end-to-end test in the scoped files.
traceabilityChecks.checklist_evidence: NOT_APPLICABLE: This iteration audited test coverage against spec requirements, not packet checklist completion evidence.
traceabilityChecks.skill_agent: PASS: deep-review loaded and review_core.md read before severity calls.
traceabilityChecks.test_count_claim: PARTIAL: scoped files contain 47 it/test cases, so 108/108 is not traceable to these two files alone.

graphEvents.label: test gap protects active orchestrator finding

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Focused test-suite traceability pass across two test files plus prior iteration state and spec requirements.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Prompt required Target 2 test suite gap analysis against iteration 6 edge cases and iteration 7 severity-resolution paths.

searchLedger.invariant: Iteration 6 edge cases should either have direct parser tests or remain represented by an active coverage finding.

searchActions.result: Direct tests cover numeric pct 100, absent pct, low pct and open tasks; they do not directly cover malformed pct, quoted pct, comments-only tasks, whitespace-only summary or derive-only concurrency.

searchLedger.rationale: Existing P2 coverage finding remains active for direct parser edge-case tests.

searchLedger.hypothesis: A test that exercises MCP validateFolder/orchestrator with the new status-completion flag should fail until T2-P1-002 is fixed.

searchActions.result: Tests cover direct resolver enforced-mode behavior and the flag helper, but imports/test cases do not call the MCP validation orchestrator path.
Prior review found orchestrator omits statusCompletionConsistencyEnforced.

searchLedger.rationale: The active orchestrator wiring defect has no direct regression test in the scoped files.

searchLedger.invariant: If the 108/108 claim refers only to these two scoped files, they should contain 108 test cases.

searchActions.result: Found 47 it/test cases total: 32 in graph-metadata-schema.vitest.ts and 15 in generated-metadata-integrity.vitest.ts.

searchLedger.rationale: The 108/108 count is not attributable to the two scoped files alone.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Broader-suite interpretation remains possible, but the two requested files contain only 47 test cases.

title: No orchestrator-level regression test covers the explicit status-completion enforcement flag

detail: REQ-005 has direct tests for the main deriveStatus and validator branches, but no scoped test pins the active MCP orchestrator enforced-mode path.

reason: Scoped files contain 47 it/test cases, not 108; broader-suite interpretation remains possible.
